seoTitle: Falcon vs Ferndale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Falcon and Ferndale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Falcon and Ferndale.
heading: Falcon vs Ferndale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Falcon, Western Australia and Ferndale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Falcon has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Ferndale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Falcon or Ferndale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Falcon has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Ferndale scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Falcon scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Ferndale scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Falcon or Ferndale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Falcon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
